headline: Dog Starts A TikTok Account, Gets 47,000 Followers, Now The Breadwinner Of The Household
summary: The dog has a sponsorship deal with a treat company. His owner is 'very proud and slightly jealous.'
fullBody: Rex the dog started a TikTok account. He has 47,000 followers. 'He's very popular,' his owner, Jake, said. Rex has a sponsorship deal with a treat company. 'He makes more than I do,' Jake said. 'I'm proud but also jealous.' Rex now has a manager. 'It's me,' Jake said. 'I'm his manager.' Rex is now the breadwinner. 'He's very supportive,' Jake said.
